ham: Hi Rahul, flight AIK123 from Delhi to Mumbai 15:30 par depart karega. Boarding 14:45 se gate B12 se shuru hoga. Kripya 30 minute pehle pahunch jao. Thanks!
spam: URGENT: Aapka electricity bill overdue hai. Agar aap <URL> 24 ghante mein payment nahi karte, to aapka supply 7pm ko cut off ho jaega. 24h mein call kare: 011-xxxxxx. Dhanyavaad.
